name: Nexus Government
mission: To oversee the legal, financial, and structural framework of Nexus City.
vision: A dynamic leadership system that relies on player voting and policy enactment to shape the world.

basic: All government decisions must be documented publicly.
No direct interference in ongoing judicial cases unless constitutional issues arise.
Elections are held dynamically; term limits must be respected.
advanced: Taxation adjustments must be passed through a general assembly vote.
The defense minister operates the state military and martial law contingencies.
Corruption RP is permitted but requires immense trace-evidence leading.

roles.name: President
roles.desc: Leading the visionary future of Nexus City.

roles.name: Defense Minister
roles.desc: Ensuring the safety and security of all citizens via state militia.

roles.name: Health Minister
roles.desc: Managing city-wide medical infrastructure and budgets.

roles.name: Finance & Business Welfare Minister
roles.desc: Driving the economic powerhouse of Nexus.
